name: The Night House
tagline: A tiny home with a big desert backyard.
intro: Tucked into the quiet edge of Yucca Valley, fifteen minutes from the national park, The Night House is a pint-sized desert hideaway that lives far larger than its footprint.

Step outside to a saltwater pool, a steaming hot tub, a cedar sauna, and a mini-golf green — all yours, all framed by Joshua trees and open sky. Days wind down around the firepit; nights end under more stars than you can count.

name: The Rain House
tagline: Where desert calm meets a little color.
intro: The Rain House is the artful one — a bold mural across the wall, a stack of manga on the shelf, and a patio built for golden-hour movie nights.
Behind the playful details is the same serene Yucca Valley escape: a private saltwater pool, hot tub, sauna, and mini-golf, with Joshua trees standing guard. Come for the photos, stay for the quiet.

name: The Oasis
tagline: Your own wide-open slice of the high desert.
intro: On a sweeping lot in Joshua Tree, The Oasis is made for gathering. Rally on your private pickleball court, roll a round of bocce, then cool off in the saltwater pool or sink into the jacuzzi as the sun drops behind the mountains.
Two king bedrooms, a fully fenced yard, hammocks, a firepit, and panoramic desert views — all just minutes from the park gate.

name: The Dome
bedsLabel: 2 King + Queen air bed · Dome sleeps 2 more
intro: The Dome's headline act is exactly what it sounds like — a private bubble dome with a queen bed, where the Milky Way is your ceiling.

Below it sits a modern desert home with a saltwater pool, jacuzzi, pickleball and bocce courts, and a firepit built for long desert nights. Two king bedrooms inside, room for the whole crew, and some of the darkest skies in California overhead.
